channel.title: D&D With Brian and Friends – Humaoid Characters
channel.description: Recent content in Humaoid Characters on D&D With Brian and Friends

item.title: Emporer Caladwen
item.description: Emporer Caladwen is the emporer of Squawhorn, who sits the thrown of The Twilight Court. He is the father to Aelrya Caladwen.

item.title: General Ashryver
item.description:
General Ashryver is the top general of Squawhorn, who regularly counsils with The Twilight Court and serves as its military arm. He is the father to Syren Ashryver.

Might be dead? Unclear, but Justine did say that he was dead.
